title: sphaerostephanos norrisii
intro: Sphaerostephanos norrisii, a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae, is a type of epiphytic fern found in tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos norrisii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe wounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, with the leaves and stems being boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
